node.statement: ||Phi||=1 in the order-unit norm. By GT-order-unit-norm, for a in B(H)_sa one has ||a||<=1 iff -I<=a<=I. If ||a||<=1 then -I<=a<=I; Phi is positive (monotone) and unital with Phi(I)=I, Phi(-I)=-I (GT-positive-unital), so -I=Phi(-I)<=Phi(a)<=Phi(I)=I, whence ||Phi(a)||<=1 (GT-order-unit-norm). Thus ||Phi||<=1; conversely ||Phi||>=||Phi(I)||=||I||=1 since Phi(I)=I. Hence ||Phi||=1.
